generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor collecting real-time occupancy data for building spaces, integrated as semantically enriched device with tenant IDs and endpoint addresses for real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based temperature sensor monitoring environmental conditions, integrated into BIM model with metadata including device IDs and endpoint addresses for standardized IoT communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based luminance sensor measuring light levels in building spaces, used for post-occupancy sensor data analysis in BOREALIS project to refine control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Monitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based CO2 sensor tracking indoor air quality, integrated with building automation systems (BAS) for real-time operational data collection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingAutomationSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized building automation system aggregating sensor data from distributed IoT devices, providing normalized operational data streams for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BASDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto from IoT sensors to digital twin infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto from IoT sensors to digital twin infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LuminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time luminance data stream transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto from IoT sensors to digital twin infrastructure, used for lighting control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminanceSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration data stream transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto from IoT sensors to digital twin infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Monitor
]

instance BASDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Aggregated building automation system data stream transmitted via Eclipse Hono/Ditto, containing normalized operational metrics from distributed sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingAutomationSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as the foundational semantic backbone for the digital twin, enriched with device metadata including sensor/actuator configurations and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichmentEnabler, ArtifactGenerationEnabler
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched device model containing tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses extracted from BIM for real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArtifactGenerationEnabler, RuntimeConfigurationEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control logic models including reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and lighting control strategies (TwinLight) embedded within BIM."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightService, BOREALISService
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized occupancy data integrated from IoT sensors, used for predictive analytics and control policy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated environmental data including temperature, luminance, and CO2 levels from IoT sensors, used for real-time monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, LuminanceDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized operational data from building automation systems, including energy consumption metrics and system performance indicators."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BASDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnrichmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering process for enriching BIM models with device metadata and control logic during the twinning process."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArtifactGenerationEnabler
]

instance ModelValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic validation framework ensuring BIM model consistency and compliance with AECO standards before deployment."
]

instance ArtifactGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated model-to-code generation process extracting metadata from BIM to create runtime interfaces for Eclipse Hono/Ditto integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT device connectivity platform providing standardized protocols for real-time data ingestion from distributed sensors."
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform enabling bidirectional communication and multi-tenancy support for building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine providing immersive real-time dashboards for building performance monitoring and interactive simulations."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework for energy consumption forecasting and occupancy pattern analysis using real-time sensor data."
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) for dynamic optimization of lighting systems balancing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration management system supporting real-time updates to control policies and sensor integrations."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building performance metrics in Unreal Engine 5 for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating energy consumption forecasts and occupancy pattern predictions to inform operational strategies."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyForecastInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance TwinLightService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Lighting control configuration service embedding domain-specific semantics into BIM for automated commissioning and control."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction
]

instance BOREALISService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting optimization service using reinforcement learning to dynamically adjust lighting based on occupancy, visual comfort, and energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficientLightingAction, VisualComfortAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling life cycle simulations to evaluate design decisions, operational strategies, and refurbishment impacts on energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentImpactInsight
]

instance MaintenanceAlertService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating automated alerts for anomalies or maintenance needs based on data-driven thresholds and machine learning models."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time immersive visualization of building performance metrics including environmental conditions, occupancy status, and system efficiency."
]

instance EnergyForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output forecasting energy consumption patterns based on real-time sensor data and historical trends."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analytical insights into occupancy patterns and space utilization derived from IoT sensor data."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control configuration for lighting systems based on domain-specific semantics embedded in BIM."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficientLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of lighting systems using reinforcement learning to optimize energy consumption while maintaining visual comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting parameters to maintain optimal visual comfort levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RefurbishmentImpactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation outcomes evaluating the impact of refurbishments on energy efficiency and operational performance."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of maintenance alerts based on anomaly detection in real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for lighting systems, configured to execute bidirectional communication with digital twin services."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for HVAC systems, receiving automated control signals from digital twin optimization services."
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for shading mechanisms, integrated with adaptive control policies for energy optimization."
]

instance PLCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable logic controller managing building automation systems and executing control logic generated by digital twin services."
]

instance IoTEnabledController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled controller for distributed building systems, facilitating bidirectional communication with digital twin infrastructure."
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance AECOBuildingDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital twin representing building infrastructures (academic, commercial, residential) throughout their entire life cycle from design to operations, leveraging BIM as semantic backbone with cyber-physical synchronization."
    base:contains BIMModel, DeviceMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AECOEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, TwinLightService, BOREALISService, SimulationService, MaintenanceAlertService
]

instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LuminanceSensor, CO2Monitor, BuildingAutomationSystem,
                 LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ShadingActuator, PLCController, IoTEnabledController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, allowing the DT to send **control commands** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) back to the physical actuators. The DT services, such as **optimization algorithms** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) or **user-defined control strategies** (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control), generate these commands based on real-time data and predefined logic. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, enabling dynamic adjustments without full redeployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sensor data update rates** (e.g., environmental sensors may update every few seconds, while occupancy data may be event-driven). The framework supports **continuous synchronization** between the PT and DT, with **runtime configuration management** enabling dynamic adjustments to data refresh rates. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the temporal fidelity of the twinning process."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM-based core**: Hosts the semantic model and device configurations.
  - **Middleware layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
  - **Visualization layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  - **Service layer**: Custom plugins and analytics (e.g., RL-based optimization in BOREALIS).
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating third-party services or domain-specific tools. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure environments, with **modularity** enabling incremental upgrades or replacements of components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the entire **building life cycle**, from **design and construction (as-designed phase)** to **operational phases (as-manufactured and as-operated)**. It supports:
  - **Design-phase integration**: Leveraging BIM models for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction-phase synchronization**: Incorporating as-built data and commissioning information.
  - **Operational-phase optimization**: Using real-time sensor data and adaptive control strategies (e.g., BOREALIS’s RL-based lighting optimization).
  - **Refurbishment and adaptation**: Enabling dynamic updates to the DT to reflect physical changes or evolving requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic coherence**: BIM’s object-based modeling ensures accurate representation of physical assets and their relationships.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto provide **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing drift between PT and DT.
  - **Validation mechanisms**: The **ODTE metric** quantifies the entanglement between the digital and physical twins, identifying discrepancies or synchronization errors.
  - **Uncertainty management**: The framework supports **probabilistic models** (e.g., RL-based policies in BOREALIS) to account for sensor noise or incomplete data.
  - **Verification and validation (V&V)**: Automated checks during the **model-driven deployment** phase ensure compliance with AECO standards and operational requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for technical connectivity, facilitating real-time data exchange between physical assets and their digital counterparts. These tools provide standardized protocols for bidirectional communication, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP, OPC UA) or architectures (e.g., cloud-edge) are not detailed in the provided documents. The focus is on **interoperability** and **scalable integration** of heterogeneous data sources."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **modular, service-oriented infrastructure**, supporting scalable and maintainable setups. The framework emphasizes **automated deployment** of runtime artifacts from enriched BIM models, reducing manual intervention. While specific hosting modes (e.g., cloud-based, edge, hybrid) are not specified, the architecture is designed for **flexibility** and **extensibility**, enabling integration with existing AECO systems and future upgrades."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through **standardized integration frameworks** and **interoperability** between the DT and external systems. The framework prioritizes seamless communication with AECO-specific tools and workflows, though specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) or external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not mentioned in the provided documents. The emphasis is on **unified data exchange** and **modular service integration** to support broader ecosystem adoption."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, with a particular focus on **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie, ISO 19650) are not explicitly listed, the framework is designed to ensure compatibility with existing AECO systems and regulatory mandates. The model-driven approach promotes **consistency** and **reusability** across projects, aligning with domain-wide adoption goals."
]
